race.comment: JASPER'S WAY (4) due for a change of luck fifth-up and comes back in trip with Stiff's claim. Covered ground with the 61kg for a tough fourth over 1700m at Wellington. Earlier runs had merit and expected to go close. CALL ME TERRY (6) rewarded for his consistency with a gritty victory over 1400m at Warren. Awkward map today and look for him doing his best work late. MRS BULL (2) game mare bursting to win another race. Comes back a level after savaging the line with a close-up third over 1300m at Orange in BM66 class. Winning claims on best figures. RELEASE POINT (1) handy fresh gelding who drops in grade with the 4kg claim. Had excuses from the wide gate with a battling eleventh over 1600m at Randwick in Highway class last October. Back with the one trial and stays in the mix. FANTASY CROWNED (16) down sharply in weight and gets map favours here. Each way contender.
